_comment: Hard stop-list of generic / structural / type-leak entity names that must NOT contribute to Brain View book-to-book bridges. Applied at query time in services/graph/queries.py:_BRAIN_VIEW_CYPHER. Drill-down queries are NOT filtered (in-book entity lists keep all entities). All `exact_lowercase` matches are compared against `toLower(e.display_name)`. `patterns` are Java regex strings combined with `|` and matched against the same lowercased name.

_categories.back_matter: Chunker-level contamination: ToC, indices, chapter headers, bibliographies that the LLM grabbed as content
_categories.type_leak: The literal type word (Person, Organization, Concept, ...) emitted as an entity
_categories.role: Generic role / kinship / occupation words mis-typed as Person or Organization
_categories.abstract: Generic Concept words that are too broad to form an informative cross-book bridge
_categories.single_char: Single-letter and ultra-short tokens (i, k, B., etc.)
_categories.pattern: Regex-based catches for structural elements (Chapter N, Table N, ...)
